Name:
The Graduates EP
(with Chris Holloway)
Notes: EP released on MySpace sometime in 2008; was later deleted at some point and resurfaced on July 19, 2013, after being acquired from Tony Loney by KTT users xxman and Carlos. Has remixes of Kid Cudi's "Day n Nite" and Kanye West's "Flashing Lights".

Name:
Chris Holloway - Who Am I
(feat. Travis Scott)
Notes: Found in early April 2013 on an old MySpace page. Said by KTT user Carlos to be a single that wasn't part of 'The Graduates EP', instead being part of a Chris Holloway EP.

Name:
B.A.P.E. Mixtape
(with OG Chess)
Notes: Mixtape released on MySpace in 2009.

Name:
Buddy Rich
(with OG Chess & Spuf Don)
Notes: Mixtape released with Spuf Don on MySpace and Travis's blog on December 9, 2009.

Name:
Cruis'n USA
(with OG Chess)
Notes: Final project released on Facebook and MySpace on June 1, 2011. A deluxe edition later dropped on July 11 (and is the version linked).

Name:
The Classmates EP
(with OG Chess)
Notes: 9-track EP released on MySpace in 2011, prior to 'Cruis'n USA'.

Name: Meadow Creek
Notes: Released on May 21, 2013. Track 1 from 'Owl Pharaoh'.

[prod. Kanye West, No I.D., Travis Scott & Ann Marie Calhoun]

The intro samples Lil Flip's "I Can Do Dat", featuring Juvenile and Skip; Z-Ro's "Can't Leave Drank Alone", featuring Lil' O; and a clip of DJ Screw speaking. Production credits were never officially confirmed, but Pharaohxx leaked them a few weeks before the song dropped; Ann Marie Calhoun is a violinist.

Name:

[prod. Travis Scott]
Notes: Released on March 4, 2012. Track 13 from the SoundCloud version of 'Owl Pharaoh'; it was missing from the download that Travis tweeted a link to (and was subsequently uploaded to most mixtape sites). Originally released as a loosie; the linked file is the original drop from Travis's website with the metadata left intact.

Name:
